entry.title: Re: How to manage document restriction in SAP public cloud? Without extension in BTP
entry.content: adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Research and Development

entry.title: Devtoberfest Missing Badges
entry.content:
If you are missing any badges for completed tutorials, please continue to report those as you have.  We are looking into each report, handing them over to IT and most times within a business day they are able to rerun the job and pickup the missing items.  

However I'm not able to respond in each post. With TechEd virtual next week, I just won't be able to reply to each thread.  We will still research each report even if we don't reply to each one individually.

Thanks,

Thomas Jung

entry.title: SAP_COM_0008 is Not Listed in the Scenario Field While Creating the New Communication Arrangement
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m currently enabling the Business Partner OData API in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and have run into an issue. While creating a Communication Arrangement, I do not see the scenario SAP_COM_0008 listed.

Here are the details:

  • Development Tenant: STARTER 080
  • Required Scope Item: 1RO (activated in STARTER 100 Customizing Tenant)

If anyone has encountered this issue or has any guidance on how to resolve it, I would greatly appreciate your help.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: How Can I Fix the "Active Entities Cannot Be Modified...

entry.title: Re: Join BSEG, BKPF, EKBE and EKPO
entry.content: EKBE contains primary keys of the other tables, where are you stuck?

entry.title: Re: Robotics and AI participating Devtoberfest on my behalf?
entry.content: Tutorials can only be completed once in the system. So, we error on the side of generosity and hand out badges and points for past completions since there is no way for people to repeat completion of the tutorials that are part of Devtoberfest.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 2 Contest Activities
entry.content: @thomas_jung , no there is nothing beyond the missing badges.

entry.title: Re: "Dynamic" Email Body for Email Notification in SAP BTP Workflow or How to add a table
entry.content: Welcome solution to a long time problem SAP never catered for.......bravo!

entry.title: Re: It is possible to make a 'https' API call in ABAP?
entry.content: Not sure to understand if you mean you're trying to use the URL with http instead of https. In ABAP, an https call requires to register the certificate in a PSE of STRUST. You may use CL_HTTP_CLIENT=>CREATE_BY_URL by indicating this PSE (SSL_ID) or CREATE_BY_DESTINATION if you define an RFC destination with the URL (or just the domain) and the PSE via SM59.

entry.title: Re: MRP X MRP live
entry.content:
Dear  DominikTylczyn, 

Thanks so much for the vision throug search links, this is  more valious to me!  I will see, thanks.

Regards,

Adilson

entry.title: CO11N Confirmation type (Final) not defaulting
entry.content:
Confirmation type not defaulting to "Auto Final confirmation" when total qty is entered in yield in CO11N transaction.  In the configuration "Define confirmation parameters", I have set the Confirmation type to "Automatic Final confirmation". 

It is defaulting to "Auto Final Confirm" when using the transaction CO11, but NOT when using the transaction CO11N. I want it to default to "Auto confirm" in transaction CO11N. How do I do that?

entry.title: SAP BO OLAP Analysis not working with MS SSAS Cube
entry.content:
When I create a workspace in SAP BO 4.3 SP04 PL07 on MS SSAS 2022 Cube, I cannot save the modify workspace if I use two o more attributs/hierarchies form the same dimension into analysis.

But, in SAP BO 4.2, the same MS OLAP Cube, save workspace correctly.

SAP BO 4.3 last patch not fix this issue.

SAP BO 4.3 work on Windows 2022.

Yes they are available -  i am loading only 2 tabs MARA and MAKT .

If I load only Mara then it works fine but when I do MARA and MAKT together then i am getting error . Adding screenshots for your information .

entry.title: Re: Join BSEG, BKPF, EKBE and EKPO
entry.content: do you get result when you query the view "SYS"."OBJECT_DEPENDENCIES" without filter ? If no, you are missing some system privileges.

entry.title: SAP WEB IDE Login Page Problem on Macbook
entry.content:
Hi all,

The SAP WebIDE I use on my MacBook stopped working after the latest macOS update. The homepage opens as shown in the screenshot below, but the login window does not load. The error message displayed in the console is: “Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (ProxyServlet: /login/canaddusers)”.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: How can I reduce the value of a posted Asset
entry.content:
AB01 is the main FI-AA posting transaction. 

  • Transactions such as ABSO or AGBL just wrap this transaction providing somed default values to process

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: I have an obvious obsession with collecting monitors.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Work Zone - Transport Route
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Getting 404 error while checking the Check connection for PORTAL_DEV subaccount.(Note: I have created the destination manually)

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: oh man.. what a question.... it was a spring sunny day in Texas back in 2013.... lol I asked my then manager, why would I want to learn sahp & he said it is S-A-P I thought, oh oh .... then, I started reading the SAP HANA developer guide HANA 1 SP05 (it was a PDF manual with like 500 pages). I became curious about the XS engine and the sapui5 JavaScript library then. Little by little got more and more into it (HANA modeling, Fiori, Build, BTP, S/4).... the rest is history .. here I am learning, sharing, watching, reading, sharing, and breathing SAP. It has been a great journey

entry.title: Re: How to check change log for condition contract
entry.content:
Hi @Rampe, 

Please check the following KBAs related to change logs issue: 
https://me.sap.com/notes/1150688/E
https://me.sap.com/notes/3309929/E
https://me.sap.com/notes/3095058/E

Hope it helps. 

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Re: Containerizing SAP S/4HANA Systems with Docker
entry.content: Hi @craigyu I just wanted to update you that we have tested containerizing full SAP S/4HANA (not just foundation) and it works! We have also performed a backup and restore of DEV and QA systems in the container and deployed them on Kubernetes. Although the images are quite large with real business data, the solution is very viable.

did you try https://localhost:8443 ?

entry.title: Re: Improvements for MRP areas in S/4HANA - Intra-Plant View

entry.title: SAP IBP Formula outside of Planning Area changing
entry.content: I just upgraded from version 2305 to 2408. I have formulas that sit outside of the planning view which reference cells within the planning view. These formulas are more than 2 columns to the right which, in the past, ensured that the formulas were not affected by any planning view change. When I do a save of the favorite now, the formulas are changed. The second row the formula is on, changes its row pointers to the last row of the planning view.

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: @SergioG_TX you tell a good SAP story. It is so great how you started SAP by reading a guide and now you are an #SAPChampion. We appreciate all that you do guiding members, teaching, and leading. Thank you! @KatherineKenneally will agree.

entry.title: cannot communicate with the nf-e on cloud service
entry.content:
Hi,

I got the "cannot communicate with the nf-e on cloud service" error while uploading the certificate in nfe_mng_cert T-code in my quality system.

I checked the RFC, Oauth2 settings, batch jobs and 3206768 note implemented.

I could not be able to find out the root cause.

Please help me on this.

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: thank you!   There is so much to learn and so many people hungry for knowledge. We have a great community and I have made many friends and memories here. cheers!

entry.title: Re: Unable Export File as a Excel using Button (Script)
entry.content:
The reason why the excel export for this script isn't working is because the code/script "ExportToExcel.ExportReport()" works blindly on exporting the data. But it doesn't know what data and which data to export. Hence, add the below line of code to showcase/highlight which data to export(in our case we are exporting the Table_1 data).

Script to be used:-

ExportToExcel_1.setWidget(Table_1);
ExportToExcel_1.exportReport();

This worked in my case. Glad if it works in your case.

entry.title: Re: SAP WEB IDE Login Page Problem on Macbook
entry.content:
WebIDE? For local development it's quite deprecated. You can have a look at BAS or VSCode and run your project locally.

If I look at the error message, sounds for me a custom login page, right? A 404 means the file cannot be found (or service). Is the service up and running?

entry.title: Re: Error when activating 'SAP Integration Suite Messages' service in 'Integration & exception monit
entry.content: Same error here, do you have any idea?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: Hi @David_Chaviano , I am currently an intern specializing in SAP MM, and I would like to express my gratitude for the Digital Skills Initiative. I am highly motivated to participate because I believe that enhancing my digital skills will greatly complement my current experience and help me grow in my professional journey. This opportunity aligns perfectly with my career goals, and I look forward to learning and contributing actively. Thank you for this fantastic initiative!

entry.title: FSM - Service Map - Manual activity planning - Skills validation
entry.content:
Unlike the Planning and Dispatching board, skills are not getting validated during manual activity assignment from the Service map.

Steps to reproduce the scenario

*Select a tech that don't possess the required skill to perform an activity.

FSM Shell > Service Map -> Select a technician in the right-side bar > Select an activity in the service map > Drag the activity to the technician's schedule (right-side bar) > Notice the activity gets assigned to a technician without any warnings though the technician doesn't possess the required skills needed to perform the activity.

Manual Activity Planning | SAP Help Portal

Is there a setting or any other way to enforce skill validation when assigning an activity from the Service map?

entry.title: Re: SSO Login issue to Successfactors
entry.content: There could be possibility that user is locked. Resolution - KBA 2086751.

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: @rishikesh_topare_24 you cover some wonderful topics. May I ask where you are located? There are location groups and many other interest groups. It is great to hear that you will attend TechEd. If you haven't yet, please join SAP TechEd - SAP Community & spread the word to others! It would be great if you can share some of your key-take aways from the event too. Best of luck!

entry.title: create a scheduling agreement automatically from source list instead of manually maintaining in ME38
entry.content: Please help me with customization / Enhancement in SAP MM to create a scheduling agreement automatically from source list instead of manually maintaining in ME38

entry.title: Introduction
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

 

My name is Alex Agyei, and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! A little about myself: I have a background in cybersecurity, database administration, and network security, with experience in Oracle. I’m passionate about advancing my skills in tech and exploring how SAP solutions can be leveraged to optimize business operations.

I’m currently working towards my SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the Vower learning group, and I am particularly keen on exploring how SAP solutions can streamline processes and drive efficiency in supply chain management, manufacturing, finance, logistics, etc. If anyone has tips on how to dive deeper into this field or any relevant resources, I’d love to hear from you!

 

I’m pursuing the SAP certification because I see it as a key to career growth in today’s competitive tech landscape. With my background in cybersecurity and database administration, I’ve developed a passion for leveraging technology to optimize business operations. Gaining expertise in SAP will help me deepen my understanding of ERP, finance, supply chain, etc. and open doors to new opportunities within my field, especially as I explore more supply chain management, manufacturing, finance, logistics, etc -focused roles.

 

I’m also open to connecting with others who are interested in technology, business transformation, AI, and cybersecurity. As someone passionate about how these areas intersect with SAP solutions, I’d love to network with like-minded professionals, share insights, and explore collaborative opportunities. Feel free to reach out if you're working in these fields or have similar interests!

 

Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you!

 

Best regards,  

Alex Agyei

Oracle PL/SQL Developer | Cybersecurity Professional

entry.title: Re: Recording SAP GUI Dropdown in Enable Now
entry.content: Dear Mani, we tried also the GUI Signature - actually all the options for GUI and it still didnt help us.. Would you know another solution? BR Mira

entry.title: Value measurement node
entry.content:
Hi Team SAP. 

 

I Have a question about the measurement node. Can we use more than once time in the same automation?

 

Then you so much. Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Value measurement node
entry.content:
Currently it is not possible to have multiple Value Measurement nodes in a single automation program as per the SAP Help article below:

SAP Emarsys Help: Value Measurement

 

If you would like to suggest a change to this behavior, please submit your idea at the SAP Emarsys Influence page. Please note that it is not possible for SAP Support Team to provide you additional information regarding the availability of this feature in a future release.

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Purchase Order Deferral Engine
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I’m trying to manage Accruals/Deferrals in a Starter Customizing environment in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud using Purchase Order Accruals, but I’m facing issues with deferral determination. 

Here’s the scenario:

I created a service purchase order with a schedule line from August 2024 to October 2024 for a total value of 1,200 EUR (400 EUR per month). In the Process Control section, I only selected Invoice Receipt.

When I run the Accruals Job (Purchase Order Accruals - Post Periodic Accruals) on 31/08, the accrual posting of 400 EUR is generated correctly.

On 15/09, I post the invoice for the full value of the purchase order. At this point, I expect that when I run the job on 30/09, the accrual will be reversed and the deferral for the third month (October) will be generated. However, the deferral is not created.

What could be the issue? Are there any different settings that need to be configured?

I’ve already checked the Accrual/Deferral configuration, but I’m still unsure why the system isn’t generating the deferral after the invoice is posted. Could it be related to the Process Control setup, or is there a specific step I might have missed in the Accruals Job configuration?

Any insights or suggestions would be highly appreciated!

entry.title: New Member Introduction to SAP Learning
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My name is Crystal, and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! A little about myself: I have a Master’s in Public Administration with a focus on Budgeting and Finance Management and over 6 years of experience in customer service, administration, and management. I’m currently expanding my skills in data analysis through self-paced learning, working on Python, Pandas, and data visualization.

I’m working towards my SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the Vower learning group, and I’m excited to deepen my knowledge in finance and business transformation within the SAP ecosystem.

I’m pursuing this certification because I’m passionate about advancing my career and leveraging technology to create more streamlined business processes. This certification will help me grow professionally and explore new opportunities in tech.

I’m also open to connecting with others who are interested in technology, business transformation, and finance.

Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you!

Best regards,
Crystal Ali, MPA

entry.title: Re: OData V4 - Max number of parallel requests
entry.content:
Never heard of a max for $batch calls, but I think there should be one (otherwise you can block the server with one call). I expect that you can define it in odata itself.

https://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/csprd02/part1-protocol/odata-v4.01-csprd02-part1-protocol.html#_Toc486263341

entry.title: Payments without boundaries: Embark on the future of payments with SAP Digital Currency Hub
entry.content:
Today’s digitization efforts in B2B payments improve the integration and automation between enterprise and financial service providers but do not fundamentally alter the way money moves. Since ages moving money from one party to another means debiting one party’s bank account while crediting the other party’s bank account potentially at a different bank in a different country involving clearing houses or correspondent banks in the case of cross-border transfers. Especially cross-border transfers are painful: expensive - up to 50 USD per transaction and slow - up to 7 days to transmit the money. Oliver Wyman and JP Morgan estimate global costs of cross-border payments of US$100bn as part of their report[1] on deposit tokens.

Rather than digitizing solely the payment process, digitizing money itself and moving payments to a new rail based on distributed ledger technology has the potential to cut these costs by 80% according to the same report.

Today SAP is introducing SAP Digital Currency Hub as an early adoption release enabling payments without boundaries – making payments near instant, available 24/7 globally and secure at low fees. SAP Digital Currency Hub enables customers making and receiving payments with stablecoins, one form of digitized money being represented as tokens on a public blockchain.

 Fig. 1: Overview SAP Digital Currency Hub

Fiat-backed stablecoins are pegged 1:1 to an underlying FIAT currency and collateralized against cash holdings or short team government securities thus avoiding any fluctuations.

As a first customer PayPal has paid invoices to EY with the PYUSD stablecoin from its core SAP ERP system utilizing SAP Digital Currency Hub.

To use this new payment rail, buyer and supplier need to establish a payment agreement specifying the stablecoin and blockchain used for settlement. SAP Digital Currency Hub currently supports PYUSD on the Ethereum and USDC on the Ethereum and Polygon blockchain. Once the payment agreement is established, invoices are picked-up during the payment run and rather than sending the payment information to a bank it is sent to SAP Digital Currency Hub for execution. Subsequently, SAP Digital Currency Hub either creates and signs a blockchain transaction if customer wish to control their digital currency holdings themselves (self-custody) or interfaces to a downstream payment processor (custody approach) for executing the blockchain transaction. Once validated and considered final on the blockchain, SAP Digital Currency Hub creates an account statement that can subsequently be uploaded to the core ERP system to reconcile payables and receivables. With SAP Digital Currency Hub stablecoin payments are as easy as bank transfers but near instant, available 24/7 globally at low fees.

SAP Digital Currency Hub demonstrates SAP’s ability to support any kind of payment process be it via traditional rails or blockchain rails and the first customer payment is proof that stablecoins can today serve as a means of payment.

Experience the future of payments today with digital currencies and check out our website or reach out to us for an in-depth discussion how we can advance your payment processes with stablecoins.

[1] Deposit Tokens, Olivery Wyman and Onyx by JP Morgan (http://jpmorgan.com/onyx/documents/deposit-tokens.pdf)

entry.title: Plant Abroad functionality in NA
entry.content:
We have implement Plant abroad functionality for EU which is offered by SAP.
We want to implement same for US Company Code. Could you please guide us to achieve the same.

entry.title: Re: Datasphere source system assignment pointing to Dev a...
entry.content:
Hi Raj,

You can use a json and use editor to change the connection. 

BDLS is for after system copy MANDT/CLNT change. Not for mapping. In BW there is a mapping table for source systems in transport destination BW system, which changes the source-system. 

As far as I know, this feature is not implemented. Only space mapping is implemented (as of August I guess)

You did not specify how do you deploy. Here some links, which will help to understand the DSP transport management. Please do note, that the 'destination' of a package is not the actual destination system, but package. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-datasphere-content-networkpackage-transport-via-btp-transport/ba-p/13759735

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/life-cycle-management-in-sap-datasphere-transporting-content-between/ba-p/13576990

Cheers,

Martin

entry.title: Hierarchy Type FSV not available in Global Hierarchies
entry.content:
Hello, 

I was trying to create a Financial Statement Version in the production environment using the Manage Global Hierarchies app. At first I tried to import an existing Financial Statement Version, but I got the error that I don't have the authorization to do so. I have role BG_GL_ACCOUNTANT assigned with the business catalog 'SAP_SFIN_BC_GL_MD_COA' and there are no restrictions on this role. 

Next I tried to create one from scratch so that I could try to use the import function. But here I see that the Financial Statement Version is not available as an option to create:

And the authorization should be correct for this. 

So what I did instead is I converted the existing (and relevant) FSV to the Global Hierarchies using the 'Migrate Financial Statement Versions to Global Hierarchies' and I have transported this to the P system (2SL with CBC). I do now see the Financial Statement Version in the Global Hierarchies app, but I can't maintain it:

I did see this topic: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/manage-global-hierarchies-financial-statement-version-disabled/qaq-p/12320254 and this mentions Q2P being active and then you can't edit FSV in the P system and I found a note 3092272 which is about semantic tags but also mentions the Q2P. But here is where I'm confused, how do I know whether Q2P is active or not? And does this mean that if I make sure Q2P is not active for Financial Statement Versions that we can edit & create FSV in the P environment? 

Because obviously I want the key user to be able to maintain the Financial Statement Version using the Global Hierarchies going forward and not to have this maintenance stuck in the Q/CBC environment. But now I can't create a Financial Statement Version nor edit an existing Financial Statement Version.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: The keyboard weighs approx. 3 kilos.

entry.title: Re: Detailed steps to establish integration between Azure blob Storage & BTP CPI
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing @rohini_potham3 but I'm afraid you may have wasted some of your time.

SAP has already provided the Azure Adapter for SAP Integration Suite  that, depending on your service plan, you can deploy into your instance. We can read in it's description the following:

-----start of transcript -------

Overview

SAP provides Azure adapter, which offers various types of API based operations to integrate Azure storage.The adapter is available only for certain service plans of the SAP Integration Suite. For more information, see SAP Note 3188446

Product Features:  

• Azure Blob Storage:

  • Create Container in the storage
  • List the Containers from the storage
  • Delete a Container from the storage
  • Upload Block Blob into the Container
  • Upload Append Blob into the Container
  • Upload a Blob from URL of another Container into the specified Container
  • List the Blobs in the Container
  • Get the specified Blob properties
  • Get or Set the Metadata for the Blob
  • Download Blob from the Container
  • Delete a Blob from the Container  

• Azure File Storage: 

  • Create Share in the storage
  • List Share from the storage
  • Delete Share in the storage
  • Get Share Properties in the storage
  • Upload File in the Directory or Share in the storage
  • List Directories and Files in the Share
  • Delete Directory in the Share
  • Download File from the Directory or Share
  • Get File properties of the File from the Directory or Share
  • Get or Set Metadata for the File  

• Azure Queue Storage:

  • Create Queue in the storage
  • List Queues in the storage
  • Delete Queue from the storage
  • Create Message in the Queue
  • Get Message(s) or Peek Message(s) from the Queue
  • Update Message in the Queue
  • Delete Message from the Queue
  • Get or Set Metadata for the Queue  

• Azure Table Storage:

  • Create Table in the storage
  • List the tables from the storage
  • Delete Table from the storage
  • Add entity to the table
  • Get entity(ies) from the table
  • Update entity in the table
  • Delete entity from the table                        

Key Features:  

  • Shared Access Signature token-based authorization
  • Shared Access Key based authorization
  • Dynamic header and property support in the receiver adapter.
  • Desired response type from Azure (JSON/XML)
  • Post processing File handling  

-----end of transcript -------

entry.title: Re: create a scheduling agreement automatically from sour...
entry.content:
Hello @dr 

There is no such a functionality and there should not be one. You are putting the process upside down. The correct process is that first you create a scheduling agreement and then you assign it as a valid source of supply in a source list. You can't automate scheduling agreement creation from a source list, as a scheduling agreement is a legally binding agreement with a supplier. As such, it should be maintained manually and carefully.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Slow performance when migrating from HPUX to LINUX
entry.content:
What are the minimum requirements to get the best performance for the migration from HPUX SYBASE 15.7 to LINUX SYBASE 16 (Documentation, improvements and various recommendations)?

The update statistics do not behave in the same performance, for example in the attached graph you can see that in HPUX it behaves much better and the same update statistics in Linux process less MB every 2 seconds.


What could be the next steps?
What could be causing the slowness and slower processing on Linux?

 

SAP Adaptive Server Enterprise

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I am excited to express my interest in the Digital Skills Initiative by SAP Learning. As a woman passionate about advancing my career in the tech industry, I truly appreciate SAP’s dedication to empowering underrepresented individuals, including women like myself, within the SAP ecosystem.

I am ready to invest the necessary time and effort to learn and grow, and I am particularly drawn to the chance to pursue SAP certification which will be a key stepping stone in my journey in SAP.

Thank you for offering this program, I look forward to the possibility of joining this amazing initiative!

entry.title: Re: New Client Copy Tool
entry.content:
Hi Dominik,

We are about to perform a system copy to create a fresh sandbox environment. In the target system we wanted to keep the users, authorizations and profiles before performing the system copy.

In order to achieve this I ran SCC8N with the SAP_USER profile to create a transport which we then will import after the copy.

 

In this target system there was a number of batch jobs with the status "Released/Susp."

After the export these jobs seemed to be released and executed according to schedule, caused by the SCC8N run. We have checked STAD, job status etc and compared timestamps an all other activity in the system at the exact time, only the client copy export was running when this happened.

Of course this behaviour was not expected!

We are on S/4HANA 2022 Initial Shipment stack in this system.

Have you experienced this before?

 

Best Regards

Sveinung Ryland

entry.title: Re: Inspection lot not generating for material and Storag...
entry.content:
Hi Akash,

Some things to check:

Did you check the 'post to inspection stock' indicator for the inspection type in the material master?

Do you have a quality level in the stage SKIP (so GR in unrestricted)?

Herman

entry.title: SAP CAP - Enable CORS Policy
entry.content:
Hello community, thanks for the help. I have a CAP service, which I consume from a React Native application using axios. I was able to bypass the CORS policy error thanks to this repository: https://github.com/Rob--W/cors-anywhere/

Allowing me to confirm that the data is being brought in correctly. The problem is that this is a temporary solution, the error I receive is the following:

I was searching for solutions on the forums and found the possibility of enabling CORS within the mta.yaml, which I did as follows:

 

_schema-version: 3.3.0
ID: BTP6S
version: 1.0.0
description: "A simple CAP project."
parameters:
  enable-parallel-deployments: true
build-parameters:
  before-all:
    - builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm ci
        - npx cds build --production
modules:
  - name: BTP6S-srv
    type: nodejs
    path: gen/srv
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
      memory: 256M
      readiness-health-check-type: http
      readiness-health-check-http-endpoint: /health
    build-parameters:
      builder: npm
    provides:
      - name: srv-api # required by consumers of CAP services (e.g. approuter)
        properties:
          srv-url: ${default-url}
    requires:
      - name: BTP6S-db
      - name: BTP6S-auth
    properties:
      CORS:
        - uriPattern: .
          allowedMethods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
          allowedOrigin:
          - host: '*'

  - name: BTP6S-db-deployer
    type: hdb
    path: gen/db
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
      memory: 256M
    requires:
      - name: BTP6S-db

  - name: BTP6S
    type: approuter.nodejs
    path: app/router
    parameters:
      keep-existing-routes: true
      disk-quota: 256M
      memory: 256M
    build-parameters:
      ignore: ["default-env.json", ".env"]
    requires:
      - name: srv-api
        group: destinations
        properties:
          name: srv-api # must be used in xs-app.json as well
          url: ~{srv-url}
          forwardAuthToken: true
      - name: BTP6S-auth

resources:
  - name: BTP6S-db
    type: com.sap.xs.hdi-container
    parameters:
      config:
        schema: BTP6S
      service: hana
      service-plan: hdi-shared
      
  - name: BTP6S-auth
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: xsuaa
      service-plan: application
      path: ./xs-security.json
      config:
        xsappname: BTP6S
        tenant-mode: dedicated

 

I added "properties CORS" inside BTP6S-srv module:

properties:
      CORS:
        - uriPattern: .
          allowedMethods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
          allowedOrigin:
          - host: '*'

I look at the "User-Provided Variables" and I can see that they have been added, but I still get the same error.

I read that it may need to be added to the approuter, which I also tried and it didn't work. However, I can't consume the approuter URL from my app because it redirects me to the login and it doesn't work for me. I need to go directly against my backend service.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: #petoberfest #devtoberfest

entry.title: SAP TM Strategy to determine vehicle resource.
entry.content:
SAP TM Strategy to determine vehicle resource.

Follow up the previous Blogs for the automate process for Freight Document creation, in this blog will explain how to determine the Vehicle resource!

If you’re making the Automatic Freight Unit planning, you can define the Resource direct in the Freight Order/Freight Booking.

In some scenario which are a fix Vehicle (resource) for this route is good approach to automate it.

Follow this step-in order to properly set up the creation strategy:

  1. Create Condition Type:

Open Customizing and go to following   -> Transportation Management -> Basic Functions -> Conditions -> Define Condition Types

Create a new entry:

Condition Type: Enter a name for your new condition e.g. "Z_VEHICL_DET"

Description: e.g. "Vehicle determination condition"

Result DDIC Type: /SCMTMS/RES_NAME à Business Object: /SCMTMS/TOR àBO Node Name: ROOT

  1. Create vehicle determination condition:

Fiori-> Conditions -> Create Condition

Give your Condition a suitable name and enter the condition type you created in the previous step.
Maintain your data access definitions as needed and set up your decision table to determine the vehicle later.

In my example I used FU type and Shipping Condition, you can setup according your business rules.

  1. Create new process controller method

Open Customizing and go to following path: SAP Transportation Management -> Basic Functions-> Process Controller -> Define Methods
Create a new entry with following values:

  • Method: DET_VEH àService: TOR_CREATE -->Description: Vehicle determination --> Meth Type: Basic Method Class/Interface: /SCMTMS/CL_CREATE_SAVE_METHODS --> Interface Component: DET_VEHICLE_RES

 

  1. Create new process controller parameters:

Open Customizing and go to following path: SAP Transportation Management -> Basic Functions -> Process Controller -> Define Parameters:

  • Parameter name: COND_ID à Service: TOR_CREATE --> Param. Type: Character String --> Data element: /SCMTMS/CONDITION_ID

 

  1. Assign Parameters to method:

Open Customizing and go to following path: SAP Transportation Management -> Basic Functions -> Process Controller -> Assign Parameters to a Method
Create new entry: Method: DET_VEH -->Parameter Name: COND_ID

  1. Assign new method to pc strategy:

Open Customizing and go to following path: SAP Transportation Management -> Basic Functions -> Process Controller -> Assign Methods to a Strategy
Create new entry:

  • Strategy: Your Creation Strategy name à Method: DET_VEH -->sequence: Suitable sequence number in your strategy

  1. Assign method parameters to a strategy:

Open Customizing and go to following path: SAP Transportation Management -> Basic Functions -> Process Controller -> Assign Method Parameters to a Strategy
Create new entry:

  • Strategy: Your strategy name à Method: DET_VEH --> Parameter Name: COND_ID-->Param. Type: Character String-->Text Field: The name of the condition you created in Step 2

After to the steps above assign the Strategy to your Freight Unit Document Type:

Now lest test the above setup;

In my example here I have 2 sales Order which I setup the Automatic Freight Unit planning (Automatic Freight Unit Planning - SAP Community)

My Sales order bellow I use Shipping condition (RL) and based on my BRF+ Condition I have setup (step 2) my Vehicle to be determine in FO is (LIMAROG)

Freight Order

My Sales order bellow I use Shipping condition (RO) and based on my BRF+ Condition I have setup (step 2) my Vehicle to be determine in FO is (LIMAROG_2)

Hope this help you!

Thank you and regards.

Rogerio Lima.

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Service Order in SAP S/4HANA 2022
entry.content:
@MagdalenaQn 

Thanks for your question. Yes it is possible to run both in parallel:

Customer service as part of compatibility scope 

AND

Service with advanced execution with item-based accounting.

However, please note the following limitations with this approach:

  1. There is no unified controlling for the two service processes
  2. Running Service with advanced execution on release SAP S/4HANA 2022 is not recommended and requires special approval by SAP

Thanks and Kind Regards,

Abhishek

entry.title: Re: Setting up a Selection &status profile in QM
entry.content:
Hi,

Alternative is to use a layout that filters out the cancelled status of the inspection lots.

Herman

entry.title: Re: Getting 502 error on SAP MDK Web Application

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP - Enable CORS Policy
entry.content:
hi @emorales 

npm i cors

Just install the npm package of cors and in srv folder - add the server.js

"use strict";

const cds = require("@sap/cds");
const cors = require("cors");

cds.on("bootstrap", app => app.use(cors()));

module.exports = cds.server;

entry.title: How can i use OCR within SAP Build App?
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I want to use the OCR functionality in a Build App.
The main idea of ​​the app would be for a field technician to use this Build App (with offline option) to photograph a serial number on an equipment. When saving the photo, I would like the OCR (or similar service) to identify this number (ID), save it in a variable, and trigger the creation of a SAP maintenance notification (e.g.: Maintenance Notification API), with the value of the variable being passed to the description of the created notification. In other words, the description of the created notification must be the same as the serial number photographed in the field.

Could anyone help me? 

Some steps and guidance would be very nice. 

Best regards.

entry.title: Does anyone know what the rules are for inclusion, to overcome this error?
entry.content: I have the same error when activating the booster, but I have not been successful in solving it. Does anyone know the rules to include to unlock this problem?

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP - Enable CORS Policy
entry.content: Hi ! Thanks for your help. I have a question for you, my CAP service uses "db/entities.cds" and "srv/entities_srv.cds". Should I create an "entities_srv.js" and add what you told me there? Or just create a "server.js" and add it in there.

entry.title: Cloud Connector Mac M1/M2/...
entry.content:
Hi community,

Installing the cloud connector on a M1/M2 macbook... brings errors if you follow the instructions on the official SAP page to the letter. Thanks to an incident that was reported, I was able to collect from the post https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/error-installing-sap-could-connector-on-mac-m1/qaq-p/12613988 the steps necessary to have cloud connector on your machine and not have to install a virtual machine.

1. Install JDK21

brew install openjdk@21

2. Download SCC - Archit x86_64 https://tools.eu1.hana.ondemand.com/#cloud

3. Download JDK 21 https://sap.github.io/SapMachine/

4. Unzip the JDK folder and move it to the path -> /opt/jdk/sapmachine-jdk-21.jdk/....

change name of the folder -> sapmachine-jdk-21.0.4.jdk to sapmachine-jdk-21.jdk

5. Unzip the sapcc-2.17.1-macosx-x64.tar.gz folder and run the following command
tar -xzof sapcc-2.17.1-macosx-x64.tar.gz

6. I run the command ./go.sh , this file is in the folder download , you will receive some popups saying that the developer of "libsapscc20jni.dylib" cannot be verified. Allow the execution of the library in the macOS Privacy & Security settings

After allowing access to the file you can run the command again and it will give you the host to enter the cloud connector

7. On the login screen of localhost, enter Administrator / manage (case sensitive) for <User Name> / <Password>.

Thanks ingo_neumann2,

https://community.sap.com/t5/user/viewprofilepage/user-id/253694

Regards,

Hernan Martinez

entry.title: Multiple entry option in Input parameters of Graphical, SQL View option in data builder data sphere
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to create multiple entry Input parameters in Graphical, SQL View option in data builder data sphere on Table. I don't see multi entry option for input parameters. Do we have any alternate way to pass multiple values through input parameters of Graphical, SQL View ? EX: Company code , i want to pass CC100, CC200 to the where clause of table/map it to the Company code field.

I appreciate all your inputs.  Thanks.

 

Regards,

Joe

entry.title: Re: Unplanned Delivery Cost of Purchasing in S4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi Qi Liu,

With reference to the unplanned delivery costs field, is it possible to have a workflow active on this field? 

We currently set a limit that the field can not exceed the amount of 500€, but we would like an approval flow from 50€ to 500€.

Thanks.

Best regards

Elias

entry.title: B2B payments with stablecoins: Integrating SAP ERP systems with SAP Digital Currency Hub
entry.content:
Today, executing, and reconciling B2B stablecoin payments and accounting for such payments need a lot of manual effort. Paying supplier invoices or receiving customer payments in stablecoins can be automated by integrating the SAP Digital Currency Hub with SAP ERP systems.

The SAP Digital Currency Hub provides account statements for stablecoin payments in an ISO 20022 format (camt.053 message definition). This standard format can be imported and processed just like any other bank statement in the ERP system (for example as described here Importing Bank Statements). It contains relevant information to reconcile incoming stablecoin payments with customer invoices, confirms outgoing stablecoin payments for supplier invoices and reflects the balances of stablecoin holdings in accounting. In addition, the stablecoin balances are visible in the cash position just like other bank account balances.

Initiating stablecoin payments is done based on the payment run in the ERP system (Overview of the Payment Run Procedure). In a co-innovation project, an SAP customer initiated a stablecoin payment by integrating their core SAP ERP system with their SAP Digital Currency Hub. The customer settled an invoice payment in stablecoins for another SAP customer. The invoice payment was initiated by a payment run in their ERP system. It was routed via the SAP Digital Currency Hub to determine the correct pay-to address (wallet address) for the supplier, and then forwarded to their blockchain platform.

This successful project demonstrates the potential of stablecoins to streamline B2B transactions, making payments faster, more secure, and easier to reconcile.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP - Enable CORS Policy
entry.content: It worked! Thank you very much. Could I ask you a question privately? If that's okay with you. Thank you.

entry.title: Can not Connect to SLD
entry.content:
hello everyone, 

I found a problem when trying to install the SAP B1 Component Wizard. This happened after I uninstalled the Component Wizard due to a "no services found" error in the SAP B1 Service Manager. and also on SAP B1 the setup wizard is always not responding when I try to Connect to SLD.  If anyone has experienced the same issue, please provide guidance.

Best regards

 
o1

entry.title: Re: S4HANA Public Cloud - how to integrate external datas...
entry.content:
@yschlaeppi ,

Thanks for the question. 

First and foremost, if you want to enrich the data in the form, the Data source of the standard form template should be available for extension in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, you can check this via app : Custom fields.

Also for example, check if the Business scenarios' like sales order/invoice is supported to have any to capture custom fields, 

Otherwise, If the data resides outside the Public Cloud system and you wanted to have a standalone form with the data coming from Public cloud and the delta data from other systems, then you may need to use SAP BTP form services to have a standalone form with enriched data. 

Please be noted that, you need to use the standard released artefacts like API/CDS/Business Objects etc (in public cloud) in order to populate the data and other services in SAP BTP to store the data coming from other systems. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/forms-service-by-adobe/sap-forms-service-cf/sap-forms-service-by-adobe 

https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/serviceCatalog/forms-service-by-adobe?region=all 

https://help.sap.com/docs/forms-service-by-adobe/sap-forms-service-neo/architecture 

Please have a look and let me know if you need any more information or provide with additional info to support you. Thanks. 

Best Regards,

Sri

entry.title: UI5 UploadSet beforeItemAdded event no longer fires.
entry.content: In my ui5 project, I have an uploadset that was working for a long time. I'm making changes to the project but not to that section. Now the beforeItemAdded event no longer seems to fire.

entry.title: Re: OData V4 - Max number of parallel requests
entry.content: There isn't a restriction related directly to use of OData, but this would fall under general system administration and be based on the available resources in the system at any given point in time.

entry.title: IGS very broken!
entry.content:
Dear experts,

In one of our systems, IGS is very broken and we need to fix it, however we're out of ideas...
Transaction SIGS says it can't connect to IGS. The RFC destination doesn't work:

 

How can we register it ? The reginfo and secinfo files allow every connection. We have tried restarting the Gateway in transaction SMGW without any success.

When running the command:

rfcexec -a IGS.<SID> -g hostname -x sapgw01

the RFC starts working, but as soon as we hit Ctrl+C to exit the process, the RFC stops working again.
And even while the RFC is working under the influence of the rfcexec command, the SIGS transaction is
showing the following error:

We keep searching on the SAP Marketplace and on google, but we can't find a solution that could help us to 
fix IGS in this particular system. This is an S/4 Hana 2023 system running on Linux. Please advise, many thanks!

entry.title: Re: Any BAPI for VB01 TCODE
entry.content: LSMW has worked for me in the past.

entry.title: Unable to Retrieve Organization Secret and User Secret from Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi all, in an attempt to integrate SAP Open Connectors to Datasphere I followed the following guide to set up BTP and establish an Open Connectors Instance:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/extend-sap-datasphere-with-sap-open-connectors/ba-p/13554164

however I require an Organizational Secret as well as a User Secret which are not visible.

I'm not sure if there are role collections but I've following the following for access troubleshooting:

https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/configuring-user-access
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/grant-users-access-to-open-connectors-capability-within-sap-integration/ba-p/13574483

I was the first Integration Suite Provisioner in this subaccount.

Any assistance would be greatly appreciated

entry.title: Re: How can I prevent materials with the deletion flag fr...
entry.content:
Hi Wendy, I ran your follow up question through our AI Consultant and got the below response.  I welcome the feedback, fee free to try our AI consultant on the Eerly Ai website

 

SAP AI Consultant

Based on the information provided, it appears that there is an inconsistency in the behavior of the "Create Sales Order" app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud when it comes to handling products marked for deletion. Here are some steps and considerations to address this issue:

1. Verify System Behavior

First, you need to verify if the behavior observed is consistent across different users and sessions. This will help determine if the issue is isolated or widespread.

2. Check SAP Notes and Knowledge Base Articles

You have already referred to SAP Knowledge Base Article 3111463, which indicates that products marked for deletion should not be available for selection via the search help/value help. Ensure you have the latest updates and patches applied to your SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system.

3. SAP Support

If the behavior persists despite the system being up-to-date, it might be a bug. In such cases, it is advisable to open a support ticket with SAP. Provide them with detailed information, including:

  • The steps to reproduce the issue.
  • Screenshots (like the ones you mentioned) showing the discrepancy.
  • Reference to SAP Note 3111463.

4. Workarounds

While waiting for a resolution from SAP, you might consider the following workarounds:

  • Manual Filtering: Instruct users to manually filter out products marked for deletion when using the search help/value help.
  • Custom Development: If feasible, consider developing a custom enhancement or user exit to exclude products marked for deletion from the search help.

5. Configuration Check

Ensure that the configuration settings related to product deletion and search help are correctly set up. Sometimes, configuration inconsistencies can lead to unexpected behavior.

6. User Training

Educate users about the current system behavior and the steps they need to take to avoid selecting products marked for deletion until the issue is resolved.

Conclusion

Based on the information from SAP Note 3111463, the system should not display products marked for deletion in the search help/value help. If it does, it is likely a bug. Opening a support ticket with SAP is the best course of action to get an official fix. Meanwhile, consider implementing temporary workarounds to mitigate the issue.

entry.title: How to have a search help for an input paramter of a RAP Action ?
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have a RAP custom action with an input parameter. It's working fine but I would like to offer a value help to users (a dropdown would be the best!). 

In my behavior definition I have : 

action ( features : instance ) myAction parameter myAbstractInputEntity result [1] $self;

Here is my abstract entity 

@EndUserText.label: 'Input for release code'
define abstract entity myAbstractInputEntity
{
      @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity:{name: C_PurReleaseCodeSrchHelp', element: 'PurchasingReleaseCode ' }}]
        key PurchasingReleaseCode     : frgco;

}

Here is the ouput: 

I couldn't find anything that works on SCN nor in RAP/CDS documentations... 

Any suggestion would be really appreciated! 


ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: Re: Build Failing with Client runtime version 4.11.167

Anyway, I will try to make a AAB-build now without reverting the Container and hope for the best.

entry.title: Group Asset error for deactivation
entry.content:
I am not able to deactivate group asset because of error"Deactivation not possible. Dep.area 01 has acquisition values". However all underlying main assets are all deactivated.

Group Asset has three depr areas (Area: 1 NBV: .01, Area: 12 NBV (derived from 01) is 1Mil.

Does anyone has any idea to fix it?

entry.title: DO NOT ALLOW CHANGE CONTRACT START DATE IN VA42:
entry.content:
Hello:

I have a question about avoid edition in fields, in VA42 transaction.

I want avoid to change Contract Start Date, if my SD document is not
in a defined status.

I think, i need to review it in userexit_field_modification, but when in SCREEN-NAME variable
check the field (VEDA-VBEGDAT) , never i have this value.

Do you know how could change edition of this field?

Thanks!!

Carlos.

entry.title: Data Locks into a model started failing with locking issue
entry.content:
Hello All - Data loads that were scheduled from Model --> Data Management view into one of the models has started failing from past one week with a locking issue (Version: Actuals). They were fine before and last week we modified import job of one of the steps. Hence modified the schedule to incorporate it. Before last week also ACTUAL version is locked. Can you give me some pointers to understand why it started failing after we modified the schedule?

I have an alternate to schedule the loads from calendar with a multi action. But any help to understand the reason behind this failure would be helpful.

Also please suggest on best ways to schedule data loads into models from source system.

Thanks,

Phani

Thanks,
Andrea

entry.title: Re: New Installation of SAP S/4HANA 2022 FPS2 – Part 3 – Best Practices Content Activation
entry.content: Getting this error while trying to import installation data
